code_prompt_defaults.json_output_contract: Return a JSON object with "answer" and "annotation".
code_prompt_defaults.json_output_contract_answer_only: Return a JSON object with "answer" only.
code_prompt_defaults.object_description: a construction site with {worker_count} workers, labeled work zones, materials, and equipment
code_prompt_defaults.object_description_missing_patch: a construction-site source panel with one missing region and lettered patch options
code_prompt_defaults.object_description_rotated_tile: a construction-site image divided into lettered tiles
code_prompt_defaults.question_text_hard_hat_color_worker_coun: How many workers are wearing {color_label} hard hats? If none are there, answer 0.
code_prompt_defaults.question_text_vest_color_worker_count: How many workers are wearing {color_label} safety vests? If none are there, answer 0.
code_prompt_defaults.question_text_vehicle_in_zone_count: How many construction vehicles are in the {zone_name}? If none are there, answer 0.
code_prompt_defaults.question_text_plain_patch_label: Which option exactly fills the missing region?
code_prompt_defaults.question_text_irregular_cutout_patch_lab: Which option matches the missing region?
code_prompt_defaults.question_text_rotated_tile_label: One of the lettered tiles is rotated relative to the rest of the construction-site image. Which tile is it?
code_prompt_defaults.answer_hint_worker_safety_gear: set "answer" to the count of {match_phrase} as an integer, using 0 if none match
code_prompt_defaults.annotation_hint_worker_safety_gear: set "annotation" to a JSON array of [x0, y0, x1, y1] boxes in image pixel coordinates around each counted worker; use [] if none match
code_prompt_defaults.answer_hint_equipment_in_zone: set "answer" to the count of construction vehicles in the {zone_name} as an integer, using 0 if none match
code_prompt_defaults.annotation_hint_equipment_in_zone: set "annotation" to a JSON array of [x0, y0, x1, y1] boxes in image pixel coordinates around each counted construction vehicle in the {zone_name}; use [] if none match
code_prompt_defaults.answer_hint_missing_patch: set "answer" to the selected option letter as a string
code_prompt_defaults.annotation_hint_missing_patch: set "annotation" to a JSON object with keys "missing_region" and "selected_option", each mapped to a [x0, y0, x1, y1] box in image pixel coordinates
code_prompt_defaults.answer_hint_rotated_tile: set "answer" to the letter of the rotated tile
code_prompt_defaults.annotation_hint_rotated_tile: set "annotation" to one [x0, y0, x1, y1] box around the rotated tile in image pixel coordinates
